title: show
text: show Display breakpoint settings. SHow Description Display the current settings for debugger commands break , call , return , and run . DebugCommandLine > sh Copy If there are breakpoints on call statement and on line 2 of the ProcScript module GP_STORE, this command shows: break on: gp_store:2 call on Copy Related Links break Set or clear a break point call Set or cancel breakpoints on call ProcScript statements return Set or clear breakpoints on return and done ProcScript statements. run Set or clear breakpoints on run statements.
